profile_policy: any explicitly resolved and fixed Profile snapshot; scene adapters are snapshotted separately
profile_evidence: record the fixed Profile path and SHA-256 plus path and SHA-256 for every active scene adapter
round_id_policy: R00, R01, R02 and later rounds in sequence
candidate_id_policy: Rnn-E01 through Rnn-E09 in row-major order
row_lineage_rule: each expansion row contains three children of one selected parent, preserving selected-parent order
lineage_display_rule: keep the stable candidate ID and render parent provenance separately as 'from Rnn-Eyy'

delivery_modes.internal-exploration: 9 -> 3 -> 9 remains internal and is never itself a user delivery requirement
delivery_modes.direct: 1x1 only when one objectively sufficient result exists and user choice would not materially change the outcome
delivery_modes.shortlist: 2x2 when viable materially different options remain and user taste authority can change the choice
delivery_modes.final-master: a direct result or user-selected shortlist tile accepted or rerendered with output evidence

delivery_generation_evidence.regenerated: prompt, raw atlas, labeled atlas, and hashes
delivery_generation_evidence.deterministic-compose: composition manifest, raw atlas, labeled atlas, and hashes

blocked_run_policy: a blocked search produces no delivery board and ends with skipped finalization
veto_policy: a delivery candidate with a veto finding cannot be returned in a ready delivery state

semantic_owners.exploration_intents: agentic planning using the fixed Profile
semantic_owners.candidate_selection: agentic TVG audit using the fixed Profile

evidence_policy: persist prompts, model path, source paths, SHA-256 hashes, candidate findings, lineage, and claim ceiling
claim_ceiling: A valid trace proves shape, evidence references, and lineage only; it does not prove value gain, aesthetic success, Profile maturity, or audit truth.
